description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Concentrate, Morph

You bite your forearm and forcefully blow air into your muscles, hardening and compressing your rubber body into a massive, spring-loaded form. For 1 minute, you gain:

  • A fly Speed of 30 feet (bouncing through the air).
  • Immunity to bludgeoning damage.
  • A +2 status bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls.
  • Your unarmed Strikes deal 2d8 bludgeoning damage and gain the shove and forceful traits.

Cooldown: When Gear Fourth ends, you cannot activate it again for 10 minutes, and you are Slowed 1 for the same duration.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
description.gm: Gear Fourth: Bound Man is a powerful transformation. The 10-minute recharge and Slowed 1 penalty are intentional. The bludgeoning immunity replaces the dedication's resistance 5 while active.
